Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion For Partition Accounting
Off Calendar Mar-03-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Michael Hawbecker, Esq. (510-219-2727) of mlhlaw and Brett Baer, Esq. (760-412-7269) of Marjoe LLC for Plaintiff/ opposing party Carol Blumenfeld Sachal.
Richard Beckman, Esq. (415-240-4087) of Beckman Blair for Defendant/Moving party JUAN RODRIGUEZ-PINA BLANCO.

The Court announces the supplemental and sur-reply were not permitted. The Court has looked at the pleadings and struck pages; There is no Court approval. The Court summarizes the issues of the case and raises the question: who pays for additional accounting and referee. Hearing is held. Both sides ARGUED disputed amounts, homeowner's fees, expenses, accounting, referee. The Court orders parties to submit namess of referees with a minimum of 2 and maximum of 3 names. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT JUAN RODRIGUEZ-PINA BLANCO's Motion For Partition Accounting is taken under submission. Parties to submit stipulated names of referees by 2/17/17. If parties do not stipulate both parties to submit a minimum of 2 and a maximum of 3 referee names by 2/17/17. The Court will make a determination by 2/24/17. Petitioner to submit a proposed order. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
